subject: Re: Fwd: NAPI closing early
body:
----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, February 13, 2007 8:16:41 AM
Subject: Fwd: NAPI closing early


FYI
Darren,
We have tons of snow, so if you don't mind, I am closing the office early, 
maybe around lunch time.  We have over 6 inches now and suppose to get 6 
more.  The roads weren't too bad this morning, but are getting worse by the 
minute.  No one in Larry's (WF) office made it in to work.  Most of NAPI 
are in.  Both of my scheduled appointments which I took the day off for 
have cancelled.  You can reach me by phone or I'm checking emails 
periodically throughout the day.  I will have Avery later this afternoon, 
but still no problem to contact me.
Peg


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
